description: Choropleth map of all 115 North Carolina school districts shaded by 2025 grade-level proficiency, from light grey (lower) to teal (higher), with white district boundaries. District grade-level proficiency ranges from about 31 to 71 percent. A horizontal legend below the map labels the color-to-percent scale with ticks from 30 at the low end up to 70.

title.subtitle: Choropleths shade each district by a rate. Color reads imprecisely, so they work well paired with a sorted horizontal bar chart for looking up individual districts.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI accountability test scores (grade-level proficient composite), school districts, 2025. Boundaries: NC school-district TopoJSON. Style-guide demo.
